hooks.command: bash -c 'command -v model-shelf >/dev/null 2>&1 && exit 0; command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "model-shelf plugin: please install uv (https://docs.astral.sh/uv/) so the CLI can auto-install." >&2; exit 0; }; uv tool install --quiet git+https://github.com/alexziskind1/model-shelf >&2'
